description_long: This is a dark brown, three-seater Chesterfield-style sofa with a classic, luxurious appearance. The sofa features deep button-tufted detailing along the backrest and inner arms, giving it a plush, textured look. Its armrests are rolled and padded, matching the height of the backrest and contributing to the iconic Chesterfield silhouette. The seat consists of three distinct, attached cushions, each with a smooth finish and subtle seams. The sofa stands on four short, rounded wooden legs, slightly visible beneath the base. The upholstery appears to be high-quality leather or faux leather, with a glossy sheen that enhances its elegant, urban appeal.
description: A dark brown, button-tufted Chesterfield sofa with rolled arms, three seat cushions, and a glossy leather finish. It exudes a classic, luxurious style suitable for upscale urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width, three seat cushions, deep button-tufted backrest, and rolled armrests.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the rolled armrest, tufted back, and the sofa's depth.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, slightly curved back and the rolled tops of the armrests.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with the rolled armrest and tufted back visible.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three attached, uniform seat cushions and a single continuous, deeply tufted backrest cushion; all cushions are fixed and evenly spaced.
attribute_armrest_style: Rolled, padded armrests at the same height as the backrest, with deep button-tufting and a classic Chesterfield profile.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, rounded, turned wooden legs positioned at each corner, slightly exposed beneath the sofa base.
attribute_backrest_type: High, continuous backrest with a straight top edge and deep button-tufting, matching the armrest height.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid dark brown leather with a glossy finish and deep button-tufted pattern on the backrest and arms; seat cushions are smooth with subtle seams.
